content.en:
After breaking through to the limit of the military level, Ye Tian began to cultivate the ultimate way of ten thousand laws, condensing the ultimate body of ten thousand laws.

In this era, this ultimate path he cultivated was still a self-created path, and it far surpassed other powerhouses from the starting point.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's body began to turn into ultimate particles, and gradually condensed the ultimate path of ten thousand laws, and countless ultimate particles combined into the ultimate body of ten thousand laws.

And with the cultivation of the ultimate body of ten thousand laws, Ye Tian's strength has also been terrifyingly improved, far stronger than before.

With his current strength, he must be much stronger than the general-level existence of this era, and it should be comparable to some king-level existence.

In his time, the king-level was the Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Master!

In a tribe like the Eagle Ministry, the number of kings is not much, and there are only dozens of "one, four, three", but the strongest one is the emperor level, but there is only one emperor level.

With Ye Tian's progress speed, it won't be long before he can surpass the emperor level.

But he was the Ultimate Extreme Venerable in his own time, and when he came here, although everything started anew, and the heavens, the earth, and the times were different, he couldn't instantly rise to the level of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, but even if he recultivated, it was far beyond the cultivation speed of others.

When Ye Tian came out of the customs, the cultivation of the general level was naturally exposed.

Then, he was going to go to the Void Demon Valley to kill a Void Demon Beast for the coming-of-age ceremony, but just before he left, the patriarch of the Eagle Tribe, the king-level Crane Shadow, asked him to come over.

So, Ye Tian came to the patriarch's residence.

"God, I didn't expect your kid to break through to the general level so quickly. It's very rare that you break through to the rank of general and haven't yet performed the rite of passage. If you want to go to the Void Demon Valley now, don't go deep into the Void Demon Valley. "

Tsurukage reminded.

"Patriarch, why is this?" Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

Crane Shadow explained: "Because the depths of the Void Demon Valley are very dangerous, the Void Demon Valley is indeed a good place, and there are many treasures in it, but if the general level goes deep into the Void Demon Valley, he will die." If it is a king-level, he is not even allowed to step into the Void Demon Valley, otherwise he will definitely die. "

"Is there some kind of powerful existence in the depths of the Void Demon Valley?"

Ye Tian guessed.

Crane Shadow looked at Ye Tian with some surprise, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to guess it, "Yes, there is an extremely terrifying existence in the depths of the Void Demon Valley, even our Eagle Department is far inferior, it is an ancient demon-level creature." "

"Ancient Demons!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

In this world, the Ancient Demon is an existence comparable to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and perhaps its strength is a little more powerful than the ordinary Ultimate Extreme Venerable.

In his time, there were only twelve Ultimate Extremes, and in this era, he casually found an ancient demon comparable to the Ultimate Extreme.

It was so unexpected!

You must know that the level of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable cannot be seen by the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord, but it seems that the location of the Ancient Demon can still be known here.

"Why is that ancient demon-level creature in the Void Demon Valley, if it is its territory, why does it stay there all the time?"

Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

Tsurukage explained, "It was sealed by the Golden God Ministry. "

"The Golden God Department?"

Ye Tian hadn't heard of this tribe yet, after all, the abyss of Aromu was too big, and he had only crossed the ultimate time and space to come to this era for a long time, and his status was not high, so it was normal for him not to hear of it.

Crane Shadow said: "The Golden God Department is a huge tribe far beyond our Eagle Ministry, the Golden God Department controls a total of hundreds of thousands of tribes, and our Eagle Department is only one of the tribes controlled by the Golden God Ministry. "

"The Golden God Department controls hundreds of thousands of tribes!!"

Ye Tian really gasped.

In his opinion, the Golden God Department was already extremely powerful, and at least there was an emperor-level existence comparable to the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord.

Even if the strength of the other tribes was only about the same as that of the Eagle Tribe, it was almost equivalent to having hundreds of thousands of Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lords.

The Ultimate Land is far from being able to gather so many Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, which shows how terrifying the powerhouses of the Abyss of Aromu are.

However, he had expected this a long time ago, after all, there must be a lot of ancient demons in the Abyss of Aromu, far exceeding the number of twelve Ultimate Extreme Masters.

In his time, he had perceived a lot of Sleeping Ultimate Ancient Demons, and each of them was extremely terrifying.

Therefore, the number of ancient demons in this era must be very large.

And the ancient demon is the ancient demon, not necessarily the ultimate ancient demon of his era, maybe the strength of the ultimate ancient demon is more powerful......

"Patriarch, the Golden God Department can seal ancient demon-level creatures, how many ancient demon-level existences do they have?" Ye Tian asked,

Crane Shadow said: "I don't know much, but on the surface, the Golden God Department has six ancient demons, and I don't know if there are more ancient demons." And there is an ancient demon in the Golden God Department whose strength is extremely strong, far surpassing that of ordinary ancient demons, and the ancient demon-level creature in the Void Demon Valley was easily suppressed and sealed in the depths of the Void Demon Valley. "

"Why don't you kill that ancient demon-level creature?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"Can't be killed!" Crane Shadow said: "It is said that there is an agreement involved, in the Abyss of Aromu, the existence of the ancient demon level is only allowed to be sealed, and it is not allowed to be killed, otherwise it will be sanctioned." Although the Golden God Department is powerful, there are tribes that are comparable to the Golden God Department, and there are also tribes that are stronger than the Golden God Department. Therefore, the six ancient demons of the Golden God Department did not dare to violate the agreement. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian somewhat understood.

Crane Shadow said again: "The ancient demon-level creature inside the Void Demon Valley is sealed, but its breath has given birth to a large number of Void Demon Beasts and some treasures in the Void Demon Valley, and the existence of the soldier level enters, and the ancient demon-level creature will not be able to manage money, and it will be fine if the level is not deep, but if the king-level enters, the ancient demon-level creature will forcibly kill 4.8, maybe there is some secret in the depths of the Void Demon Valley." However, I haven't been there either, and I don't know any secrets. Remember, don't you be curious, understand?"

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded in response.

Immediately, he went to the Valley of the Void Demons.

He only killed one Void Demon Beast outside the Void Demon Valley, and then brought this Void Demon Beast back.

He had killed the Void Demon Beast before, but the Void Demon Beast had to be killed not long ago, and it was the sacrifice needed for the coming-of-age ceremony.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian returned to the Eagle Department and completed the coming-of-age ceremony, from today on, he is an adult member of the Eagle Ministry, and has a higher status and learns some core inheritances of the Eagle Ministry.

And for the first time, Ye Tian went to learn more core inheritances, so as to make up for the improvement of his ultimate way of ten thousand laws and the perception of the ultimate particles.
